marketState: neutral-to-slightly-bearish; price sits modestly rich vs fair value into a storage surplus, but downside is cushioned by hot current demand and already-net-short spec positioning
summary: Front-month NG is running about $0.29 above the $2.96 fair-value estimate (band $2.46-$3.46), and seasonality shows the price tracking above its typical-year path (+2.5pp vs median) with only a 19% historical chance of being higher in 4 weeks and a typical 4-week drift of -1.8% - both bearish tilts, though reliability is explicitly flagged Low (51pp spread). Storage is +151 Bcf above the 5-year average, reinforcing a bearish supply backdrop, and 1w/1d technicals show a bearish trend/EMA cross even as shorter intraday frames are neutral. Current weather demand is running +31% above the 5-year normal (supportive) but fell sharply in the last 24h, and critically the forward demand_1_7D and demand_8_16D readings plus the plus7D/14D/21D fair-value projections are all missing from this snapshot, removing the two data points most needed for real conviction on the next 1-3 weeks. Managed-money is net short but only at the 18th percentile of the last 5 years - short, not extreme - which caps downside conviction rather than confirming it. Net effect: a modest mean-reversion-lower lean for the multi-week horizon, and a wait-for-more-data stance for the near-term trade given the forward weather/fair-value gaps.

longTerm.tp2: $2.65 (toward lower fair-value band / seasonal shoulder pricing)
longTerm.rationale: Price is SLIGHTLY OVER fair value and above its typical seasonal path while the 4-week seasonality odds favor a pullback (19% prob higher, typical -1.8% move), and a +151 Bcf storage surplus vs the 5-year average adds a bearish supply overhang; 1w/1d technicals confirm a bearish tilt (50<200 EMA cross).
longTerm.invalidation: A close back above $3.50 (above the fair-value band) or a storage print that flips toward/below the 5-year average would invalidate the short thesis.

shortTerm.rationale: The demand_1_7D and demand_8_16D weather readings and the plus7D fair-value projection - the core near-term inputs - are all null in this snapshot, and technicals are mixed (5m/15m/1h/1d neutral, 4h bullish, 1w bearish) with no clear breakout (all timeframes 'inside band').
shortTerm.trigger: Wait for demand_1_7D/8_16D weather forecasts and plus7D fair value to populate, or for a decisive technical break (sustained close below ~$3.15 for a short, or reclaim of ~$3.35-3.40 with RSI>60 for a long) before sizing a near-term trade.

Seasonality: only 19% historical odds of higher price in 4 weeks, typical 4w move -1.8%, but reliability flagged Low

risks: Missing demand_1_7D/8_16D and plus7D/14D/21D fair-value data materially weakens conviction on any near-term call
